title: Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral
tagline: Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral — heritage city of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral, Kerala

overview.short: The Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral, also known as the Vimalagiri Cathedral or as Angathattu Palli located at Kottayam is the cathedral of the Diocese of Vijayapuram.
overview.description: The Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral, also known as the Vimalagiri Cathedral or as Angathattu Palli located at Kottayam is the cathedral of the Diocese of Vijayapuram. Built in the Gothic architectural style, the church has a 172-foot tall tower which is one of the tallest church towers in Kerala. The foundation stone of Vimalagiri Church was laid in the year 1956. The construction of the imposing edifice was finished in the year 1964.

topPlaces.name: Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: The Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary is an Oriental Protestant Seminary, established in 1926 in Kottayam, Kerala, to train clergy for the Mar Thoma Syrian Church. The seminary has been affiliated with Senate of Serampore College (University).

image.alt: Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary, Kottayam

topPlaces.name: Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Kottayam (IPA: [ko:ʈ:ajam]) is a city in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is the district headquarters of the district and is located about 151 km (93.8 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Catholicate Aramana Chapel
topPlaces.description: The Catholicate Aramana Chapel in Kottayam, Kerala, India, is the personal chapel of the Catholicos, located at the Catholicate Aramana which is the headquarters of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church and residence of the Catholicos of the East and Malankara Metropolitan. Many previous catholicoi including Paulose II (Indian Orthodox Church) are entombed there.

topPlaces.name: Malloossery
topPlaces.description: Malloossery is a small village in Kottayam district of Kerala state, south India. It is close to Kottayam.

topPlaces.name: Kumaranalloor
topPlaces.description: Kumaranalloor is a suburb of Kottayam city, Kottayam taluk, Kerala, India. Kottayam city is just 5 km south of Kumaranalloor.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Church, Kottayam, commonly known as Kottayam Cheriapally, is a Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church located in Kottayam, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Perumbaikad
topPlaces.description: Perumbaikad is a census town in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Thalappara Kotta
topPlaces.description: Thalappara Kotta (തലപ്പാറ കോട്ട) and Villaliveera are closely related to Sabarimala rituals and ceremonies. According to myths, Manikanda on his journey to Sabarimala was accompanied by Villaliveera, the Thalappara chief.

items.activity: Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary, Kottayam
items.note: The Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary is an Oriental Protestant Seminary, established in 1926 in Kottayam, Kerala, to train clergy for the Mar Thoma Syrian Church. The seminary has been affiliated with Senate of Serampore College (University).

Kottayam (IPA: [ko:ʈ:ajam]) is a city in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is the district headquarters of the district and is located about 151 km (93.8 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

The Catholicate Aramana Chapel in Kottayam, Kerala, India, is the personal chapel of the Catholicos, located at the Catholicate Aramana which is the headquarters of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church and residence of the Catholicos of the East and Malankara Metropolitan. Many previous catholicoi including Paulose II (Indian Orthodox Church) are entombed there.
Malloossery is a small village in Kottayam district of Kerala state, south India. It is close to Kottayam.
Kumaranalloor is a suburb of Kottayam city, Kottayam taluk, Kerala, India. Kottayam city is just 5 km south of Kumaranalloor.
St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Church, Kottayam, commonly known as Kottayam Cheriapally, is a Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church located in Kottayam, Kerala, India.
Perumbaikad is a census town in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

Thalappara Kotta (തലപ്പാറ കോട്ട) and Villaliveera are closely related to Sabarimala rituals and ceremonies. According to myths, Manikanda on his journey to Sabarimala was accompanied by Villaliveera, the Thalappara chief.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral?
faq.a: The best time to visit Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (64 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral?
faq.a: Stays in Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mar Thoma Syrian Theological Seminary, Kottayam, Kottayam, Catholicate Aramana Chapel, Malloossery, Kumaranalloor.
